jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Targeted command/deployment/operation-task/API tests passed: command service 8/8 plus neighboring tests 17/17
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted and active; /api/status healthy; /api/commands and /api/deployments returned 401; /operation-tasks and /deployments returned 307; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 command/deployment SSH execution decoupling stage 1
lastRun.summary: Approved/direct command requests now transition to RUNNING, mark targets RUNNING, write an enqueue log, and return to API/review/deployment callers before SSH target execution finalizes asynchronously in-process. This is the first deployable slice of moving command/deployment execution out of synchronous API paths; durable worker cancellation/timeouts remain on the backlog.
validation: git status checked clean before work
no overlapping remediation/build/test process found other than the preflight check itself
systemctl restart vcontrolhub-next.service vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service succeeded; both active
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted and smoke-tested successfully.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P6 durable command/deployment background worker model: persistence across restarts, explicit timeouts/output limits, cancellation controls, and task status reconciliation.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
